posts.author: jmgvirtualconsulting (Jose Maria Gonzalez)
posts.cookedHtml:
Dear support Team,

We are experiencing an issue with duplicate tags in our system. We understand that some of these duplicated tags appear under public and shareable tags. As you can see in the attached screenshot, some tags with contacts are duplicated as both public and shareable tags.

For us would be great to merge these duplicate tags? Ideally, we would like to consolidate them into either public or shareable tags to avoid confusion and maintain consistency.

Thank you for your time and assistance.

Rgds,
J.
